description: Punch a Hunter as he is pouncing.
hint: Use the secondary fire (shove/melee) right before a leaping Hunter lands on you to knock them back mid-air.

description: Rescue a Survivor from a Smoker's tongue before he takes damage.
hint: Quickly shoot the Smoker's tongue or shove the teammate being pulled the moment they are grabbed.

description: Kill a Witch with a single headshot.
hint: Use a Tier 2 Shotgun (Auto or Pump). Turn off your flashlight, sneak up behind her, and shoot her point-blank in the back of the head/neck.

description: No Survivors take damage after contacting the rescue vehicle.
hint: Best done on the No Mercy rooftop finale. Find a secure camping spot (like under the stairs) and let bots or teammates cover you until the chopper doors open.

description: You or another Survivor take no damage after being vomited on by a Boomer.
hint: When boomed, immediately back into a corner and wildly melee to push away infected while your team shoots them.

description: Protect any Survivor from an attacking Infected 50 times.
hint: Unlocks naturally over time. Stay near teammates and quickly kill zombies that are actively hitting them.

description: Survive an entire campaign using only pistols.
hint: Equip dual pistols and never switch to your primary weapon. You can still use throwables (pipe bombs, molotovs) and stationary guns.

description: Heal 25 Survivors with a first aid kit.
hint: Always carry a first aid kit and heal teammates (Right-click) when their health is in the red.

description: Give pain pills to 10 Survivors.
hint: Right-click to hand your pain pills to teammates who have low health.

description: Revive 50 incapacitated Survivors.
hint: Pick up incapacitated teammates by holding the interact button. Can be farmed by playing on Expert and letting bots go down.

description: Rescue a Survivor trapped in a closet.
hint: When a teammate dies, they will eventually respawn in a closed room ahead in the map. Open the door to free them.

description: Shove a Hunter off of a pinned and helpless Survivor.
hint: Run up to a teammate who is pinned by a Hunter and press the shove/melee button to knock the Hunter off.

description: Kill a Smoker who has grabbed you with his tongue.
hint: When grabbed by a Smoker, you have a 1-2 second window to quickly aim and shoot him before you are fully ensnared and lose control.

description: Kill 10 Smokers as they are pulling helpless Survivors.
hint: Keep an eye out for Smokers grabbing teammates. Shoot the Smoker itself instead of shoving the teammate or shooting the tongue.

description: Set 101 Infected on fire.
hint: Throw Molotovs into large hordes or use gas cans during panic events. Unlocks naturally over time.

description: Sneak past all Witches in a campaign without disturbing one.
hint: Turn off flashlights, stop shooting, and sneak carefully around any Witches you hear. Do not get close.

description: Single-handedly kill a Tank.
hint: Play on Easy solo. Shoot your bot teammates so they go down, then use a Molotov and an assault rifle to kill the Tank yourself.

description: Kill a Tank without it dealing any damage to a Survivor.
hint: Keep your distance! Throw a Molotov on the Tank and run away until it burns to death. Play on Easy.

description: Play an entire campaign with no Survivors taking friendly fire damage.
hint: Play on Easy (where friendly fire damage is minimized/disabled in L4D2, but to be safe, use melee weapons frequently and avoid explosives).

description: Beat a campaign with all 4 Survivors.
hint: Play on Easy. Keep everyone healed during the finale and ensure all four players/bots make it to the rescue vehicle.

description: Finish a campaign without ever using a first aid kit on yourself.
hint: Play on Easy. Rely entirely on pain pills/adrenaline, or let teammates heal you. Do not press the heal button on yourself.

description: Kill a Witch without any Survivor taking damage from her.
hint: Either use the 'Cr0wnd' method (one-shot with a tier 2 shotgun) or ignite her with a Molotov and run away while teammates shoot her.

description: Kill 1000 Infected with a mounted machine gun.
hint: Use the mounted miniguns found in finales like No Mercy or Crash Course. Mow down hordes. Kills accumulate across playthroughs.

description: Blow up 20 Infected in a single explosion.
hint: Wait for a Boomer bile explosion or pipe bomb to gather a massive horde, then shoot a nearby gas can or propane tank.

description: Kill 53,595 Infected.
hint: Requires grinding over many hours of gameplay. Finales with infinite hordes or custom survival maps speed this up.

description: Heal a fellow Survivor when your own health is below 10.
hint: Let your health drop below 10 (screen will be very red/black-and-white), then use a medkit on a teammate instead of yourself.

description: Save another Survivor from a Special Infected while on the ground.
hint: When you are incapacitated (on the ground with pistols), shoot and kill a Hunter, Smoker, or Jockey that is actively attacking a teammate.

description: Shove a Boomer and then kill him without him splashing on anyone.
hint: When a Boomer is close, shove (Right-click) to push it back, quickly step backward, and shoot it from a safe distance.

description: Survive a campaign without being incapacitated.
hint: Play on Easy difficulty, stick close to your team, and always keep your health above 50 to avoid going down.

description: Leave a safe room to save an incapped teammate and bring them back safely.
hint: Once inside the saferoom, if a teammate goes down outside, leave the room, revive them, and both return inside before closing the door.

description: Survive any campaign on Expert.
hint: Take it slow on Expert. Stick to corners, use melee for regular infected to avoid friendly fire, and save Molotovs for Tanks.

display_name: WHAT ARE YOU TRYING TO PROVE?
description: Survive all campaigns on Expert.
hint: Requires completing all original campaigns on Expert. Patience, communication, and corner-camping during hordes are essential.

description: Survive a campaign with no Survivors taking damage from Special Infected.
hint: Extremely difficult. Play on Easy. Move fast, listen for audio cues, and instantly snipe/kill Special Infected before they can attack.

description: Light a Witch with a Molotov.
hint: Throw a Molotov directly at a Witch from a safe distance.

description: Light a Tank with a Molotov.
hint: Throw a Molotov directly at a Tank to set it on fire.

description: Kill an Infected with a single blow from behind.
hint: Sneak up behind an unaware common zombie and hit it in the back with a melee attack.

description: All Survivors complete a campaign without being vomited on.
hint: Play on Easy. Shoot Boomers from far away, constantly check corners so you aren't ambushed, and shove them if they get close.

description: Make 100 headshot kills.
hint: Aim for the head! Use sniper rifles, magnums, or assault rifles for accurate shots. Unlocks naturally.

description: Headshot a Hunter while he's leaping.
hint: Use a shotgun or sniper. Aim slightly above the Hunter as it leaps toward you and fire. Takes practice and timing.

description: Survive the No Mercy campaign.
hint: Complete the No Mercy campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Death Toll campaign.
hint: Complete the Death Toll campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Dead Air campaign.
hint: Complete the Dead Air campaign on any difficulty.

description: Survive the Blood Harvest campaign.
hint: Complete the Blood Harvest campaign on any difficulty.

description: Cover four Survivors with Boomer bile at once.
hint: In Versus mode, wait until all four survivors are in a tight space (like a closet or saferoom) and vomit on them.

description: Drag a Survivor 100 feet with your tongue as a Smoker.
hint: In Versus mode, find a high rooftop or long alleyway (like in No Mercy Chapter 1) and pull a survivor from maximum distance.

description: Constrict two Survivors on one life as a Smoker.
hint: In Versus, pull a survivor, wait for your ability to recharge while staying hidden, and pull a second survivor before dying.

description: Pounce two different Survivors on one life as a Hunter.
hint: In Versus, pounce a survivor, wait for teammates to shove you off, run away/hide until your cooldown finishes, and pounce again.

description: Kill all four Survivors on one life as a Tank.
hint: In Versus, wait until survivors are cornered or distracted by a horde, then incapacitate all four of them without dying.

description: Dole out 5000 total Survivor damage as a Special Infected.
hint: Play Versus matches regularly. This will unlock over time as you deal cumulative damage as the infected.

description: As an Infected, incap a Survivor who has entered and left a safe room.
hint: In Versus, wait until a survivor steps out of the saferoom (usually to grab an item or save a teammate), then attack them.

description: Catch a rare strain of infection, then pass it on to someone else.
hint: Kill an infected player (in Versus or Scavenge) who already has this achievement. It is a highly common 'viral' achievement.

description: Complete one round of Survival on The Last Stand.
hint: Start a Survival match on the map 'The Last Stand' and let the team die. Just playing it once unlocks this.

description: Earn a Bronze medal in Survival mode on any official level.
hint: Survive for 4 minutes in Survival mode. Find a corner with only one or two entry points and stockpile gas cans/propane.

description: Earn a Silver medal in Survival mode on any official level.
hint: Survive for 7 minutes in Survival mode.

description: Earn a Gold medal in Survival mode on any official level.
hint: Survive for 10 minutes in Survival mode.

description: Earn at least a Bronze medal on every official Survival level.
hint: Survive for 4 minutes on all original L4D1 Survival maps.

description: Earn at least a Silver medal on every official Survival level.
hint: Survive for 7 minutes on all original L4D1 Survival maps.

description: Earn a Gold medal on every official Survival level.
hint: Survive for 10 minutes on all original L4D1 Survival maps. Requires great teamwork, map knowledge, and strong camping spots.

description: Survive the Crash Course Campaign.
hint: Complete the Crash Course campaign on any difficulty.

description: Restart the generator within 30 seconds of it shutting off.
hint: During the Crash Course finale, have a player camp next to the generator so they can immediately restart it when it breaks.

description: Kill 5,359 Infected in the Crash Course campaign.
hint: Kills accumulate across multiple playthroughs of the Crash Course campaign.

description: Win a Versus campaign of Crash Course.
hint: Play and win a Versus match on Crash Course.

description: Your team wipes all Survivors after the escape vehicle has opened in Crash Course.
hint: In Versus, wait as infected until the escape truck lowers its ramp in the finale, then coordinate an attack to wipe out the survivors.

description: As A Tank hit 20 Survivors with a car in the Crash Course campaign.
hint: In Versus, play as the Tank and punch the alarm cars scattered around the map into the survivors. Cumulates over time.

description: Pounce a Survivor for 25 points of damage in the Crash Course campaign.
hint: In Versus, get to the highest roof possible as a Hunter and pounce down onto a survivor. The longer the fall, the higher the damage.

description: Smoker pull a bile-covered Survivor until you hold him during Crash Course.
hint: In Versus, wait for a Boomer to vomit on a survivor, then as a Smoker, pull that same survivor.

description: Stun a Tank with an explosion in the Crash Course campaign.
hint: Shoot a propane tank or use a pipe bomb right next to a Tank to stun it.

description: Your team incapacitates three Survivors within five seconds.
hint: Coordinate an attack in Versus. Have a Boomer, Hunter, and Smoker/Charger attack simultaneously.

description: Complete "The Sacrifice".
hint: Complete The Sacrifice campaign on any difficulty.

description: Have Bill sacrifice himself for the team.
hint: During the finale, when someone needs to drop down to restart the generator, ensure the player playing as Bill does it.

description: Kill a Special Infected with an exploding barrel.
hint: Shoot one of the red explosive barrels scattered throughout The Sacrifice when a Special Infected is standing near it.

description: Have all 3 generators running at once in "The Sacrifice" finale.
hint: During the finale, have three players stand by the three generators and press the button on all of them at the exact same time.

description: As a Special Infected, incap someone who is trying to sacrifice themselves.
hint: In Versus, wait until a survivor jumps down to restart the final generator, then incapacitate them (Smoker/Hunter) before they press the button.
